Extension enables training sharing. Share training via email, facebook or any chat platform due to using stringified JSON format.

Want to share your workout with friends?

You want to import training?

This Chrome browser extension provides support for activating links and other HTML elements using voice commands.

Click by Voice numbers each clickable or focusable item at all times and allows activating them via keyboard.  For example, to open a link numbered 13 in a new window, you could manually hit control shift space then type "13:w" into the resulting pop-up then hit enter.  In practice, a voice command like "window pick 1 3" would be used to type these keys.  

WARNING: this extension by itself provides no voice functionality; procurement of the needed voice commands is the user's responsibility. One recommended means of doing this is to use Vocola (http://vocola.net/). 

Supported functionality includes focusing input elements, clicking elements, opening links in the same tab/a new (focused) tab/a new window, and removing the keyboard focus from the current element.  For how to use Click by Voice, see https://github.com/mdbridge/click-by-voice/blob/master/README.md.  CbV provides functionality similar to that of Firefox's mouseless browsing extension for voice control.

Adds a 'Create File' button to code containers on web pages, allowing you to download the code as a file.

ChatGPT Code Downloader is a handy tool for web developers who frequently copy and paste code snippets from the web into their text editors or IDEs. With this plugin, you can easily create a new file from any code snippet on a webpage, and download it in the appropriate file format for your language of choice.

Once you install the plugin, it will automatically add a "Create File" button to every code container on the webpage, making it easy to create and download new files without having to manually copy and paste code snippets. The plugin currently supports a wide range of programming languages, including JavaScript, HTML, CSS, Python, Java, C#, C++, Ruby, Go, Swift, SQL, and more.

This plugin is designed to be lightweight and non-intrusive, and it works seamlessly with most popular text editors and IDEs. Whether you're a seasoned developer or just starting out, ChatGPT Code Downloader can help you save time and streamline your workflow, so you can focus on what really matters - writing great code!
Удобное расширение позволяющее легко исправлять текст написанный в неправильной раскладке или регистре.

С этим расширением вы можете легко исправить текст, написанный в неправильной раскладке или регистре. Просто выделите текст и нажмите сочетание клавиш Alt+W + прокрутка колесиком мыши, чтобы моментально исправить текст. Также, можно щелкнуть по иконке расширения и отредактировать текст из удобного всплывающего окна. Забудьте о лишних трудностях в редактировании текста — Инверсия раскладки и регистра текста сделает это быстро и легко!

Способы использования:
- Вызвать контекстное меню нажав на выделенный текст правой кнопкой мыши
- Исправление текста в всплывающем окне расширения (открывается нажатием на иконку расширения), можно исправлять выделенный/вставленный из буфера обмена текст

Комбинации для быстрого исправления выделенного текста:
- Alt+W + скролл мыши для исправления  выделенного текста
- Ctrl+Q+R - Инверсия раскладки текста
- Ctrl+Q+E - Переключение  текста в латиницу
- Ctrl+Q+Y - Переключение текста в кириллицу
- Ctrl+Q+I - Инверсия регистра выделенного текста
- Ctrl+Q+U - Переключение текста в верхний регистр
- Ctrl+Q+L - Переключение текста в нижний регистр

Seamlessly access all your copied content
Copy on text selection in current page automatically. Double-click to select and copy text automatically. Ctrl + click to paste.

Do you routinely copy text from one webpage to another page or app? Are your fingers strained and hurting from all that copying and pasting? Or, do you just want or need a helping hand?

Well then this is the perfect extension for you!

Copy text on a webpage simply by selecting it! With a bonus "Ctrl + click" to paste text!

Features:

- *New* "Copied" confirmation bubble.
- Select text on page with mouse or touchpad and release to copy text selection automatically.
- Double-click text to select that word, sentence, or paragraph and copy automatically.
- Ctrl + A to select all then click with mouse to copy and deselect.
- Hold alt while selecting to disable copy on select functionality in real-time.
- Ctrl + click to paste clipboard text.
- Dark mode on/off.

If you need to select text to replace while "copy on text selection" is turned on and you don't want to overwrite your clipboard in doing so:

- Hold alt + select text to disable "copy on text selection" in real-time. Note that after you make your text selection, the mouse button must be released before the alt key.
  
- Alternatively (although alt + select is better IMO), you could select the text that you want to replace first and then select text from another page with copy on select functionality. Then come back to the page where you already have the text selected that you want to replace and paste.
  
- You could also select text to copy and then when you go to select other text to replace and ctrl + v before releasing the mouse button (because the mouse up triggers the copy of the selected text). This works between different pages and also within the same page.

Planned updates:

- Triple-click to select sentences or paragraphs and copy selection automatically. For now, you can either hold mouse down and select the sentence or paragraph, or triple-click and then click again to copy (so quadruple-click basically).

Notes:

- For the CoTS feature to work, either after installing the extension or toggling the feature on, you may need to refresh any pages/tabs that were previously open.

- The features included in this extension may not work on some deeper level div, textbox, iframe, or other protected elements.

- When using "ctrl + click" to paste, you may get a pop-up from the site you're on saying that it is requesting access to your clipboard. This happens because the extension is handling the paste action (on ctrl + click) to paste your clipboard content into the site's page. Your clipboard information is not uploaded or sent to any site (that you're not already pasting to) and is not sent to the developer or uploaded to any other servers.

This extension helps to paste the clipboard (password, etc) to vSphere VM HTML console via keystrokes

This extension helps to paste the clipboard (password, etc) to vSphere VM HTML console via keystrokes, simulating keyboard input. Based on mengji "Paste To VM" extension - with removed jquery (calls replaced with native js), v3 compatible, for security purposes it clears the clipboard after first paste. Make sure to reload the console tab for clean initialization, don't click on the VM console window, just press Ctl-Shift-v (Win, Linux) or Command-shift-v (Mac) to paste the clipboard text to VM console via keystrokes simulation.

Amadeus Wallet is a security-first Chrome extension wallet for the Amadeus blockchain. It lets you create or import a wallet,…

Amadeus Wallet is a security-first Chrome extension wallet for the Amadeus blockchain. It lets you create or import a wallet, connect to dApps, sign transactions and API key requests with clear prompts, and review activity in a modern, responsive interface.

KEY FEATURES

• Wallet creation & import — Generate a new wallet with a recovery phrase, or import an existing wallet using your seed phrase or private key. Recovery phrase verification ensures you've backed it up before continuing.

• Password-protected encryption — Your private keys are encrypted with a password you choose and stored locally in the extension. Keys are never sent to any server.

• Auto-lock — The wallet automatically locks after a period of inactivity to protect your funds if you step away from your device.

• Send transactions — Transfer native tokens with a clear review screen showing recipient, amount, and fees before you confirm.

• dApp connections — Connect to Amadeus-compatible dApps via the extension's injected provider. Every connection request shows the requesting site so you can approve or reject it explicitly.

• Transaction signing — Review and approve transaction-signing requests from connected dApps with full details before signing.

• API key requests — Generate signed API keys for dApps that request them, with a confirmation prompt for each request.

• Wallet Display Mode — Choose how the extension opens from settings: as a standard Chrome popup, or docked in Chrome's side panel for a persistent view while you browse.

• Activity history — Browse a list of your past transactions and signing activity in a clean, responsive UI.

PRIVACY & SECURITY

Private keys stay encrypted on your device — they are never transmitted, synced, or shared. All dApp requests are validated before they reach your accounts, and every sensitive action requires explicit user approval.

Take full control of your Amadeus assets with an extension built for clarity and safety.
Fixed Download Button for Pinterest: send media URL to clickpin.app.

ClickPin – Pinterest Video Downloader makes it simple to save videos, GIFs, and images from Pinterest directly to your device. With a lightweight and user-friendly design, the extension adds a download button that sends the media URL to ClickPin.app, where you can instantly download your favorite content.

Key features:

Download Pinterest videos, GIFs, and images in high quality.

One-click download button integrated into Pinterest posts.

Works on desktop Chrome with a smooth and fast experience.

100% free, safe, and easy to use.

ClickPin is the perfect tool for users who want to quickly save and organize content from Pinterest without extra steps.
Quickly download Photos, Videos, Reels, Stories and Profile from Instagram.

Insget - The Fastest Way to Save Instagram Content

Save any Instagram photo, video, Reel, Story, IGTV episode, or MP3 audio in one click. 100% free, no watermarks, no sign-up.

FEATURES
- Photo Saver - download single images or entire carousels in original quality
- Video Downloader - grab clean MP4 files with no watermark
- Story Downloader - keep Stories before they disappear
- Reel Downloader - capture trending Reels in full HD
- IGTV Downloader - save long-form videos without limits
- MP3 Converter - extract high-quality audio from any video or Reel
- Completely Free - no registration, no subscriptions, no hidden fees

HOW TO USE
1. Install Insget from the Chrome Web Store.
2. Open instagram.com in your browser.
3. A "Download" button appears on every photo, video, Reel, or Story.
4. Click once-your file saves instantly to your Downloads folder.

PRIVACY & SECURITY
All downloads happen locally in your browser. Insget never collects or stores your Instagram login, cookies, or personal data.

REMEMBER
Always respect copyright. Download only the content you own, have permission to save, or plan to view offline for personal use.

Create high-quality blog posts in minutes with AI - right within Notion.

Feather AI is an AI assistant to help you with writing blog content inside Notion.

You don't need to use multiple tools to create the first draft of your blog post. 

Use Feather AI extension with Notion & do everything right there in one place!

Easy slash commands to accomplish what you exactly want:

/outline -> Generate the blog post outline based on the Notion page title.

/points -> Create some starting points based on each outline text.

/expand -> Expand to write in-depth content for that selected point.

/complete -> Complete the expanded paragraph with some conclusion or a takeaway.

Overcome your writer’s block & do more in less time.
1. Install the extension from the Chrome web store.
2. Make a new Notion page with the topic name as a title.
3. Get 4 new Notion commands & use them to create your first draft.


No more staring at the blank page.

Install Feather AI today.
